text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I drink a glass of water and do ten minutes of stretching. After a quick shower, I have breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My work starts at 9 AM, and I focus on tasks until lunchtime. In the afternoon, I take a 30-minute walk to stay active. After work, I go for a run or do yoga at home. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading, or watching a show. I try to be in bed by 10:30 PM. Consistency helps me feel organized and healthy.
